  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "To focus the review of this paragraph, should I prioritize A) sentence-level editing for clarity, concision, and tone (R1.6), B) concept/claims review—thesis framing, logical consistency, and novelty/overclaim risks (R1.1/R1.2/R1.4), or C) evidence–claim alignment based only on what’s stated here (R1.3)? Please reply A, B, or C.",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "A generic request to “take a look at this paragraph” most often implies sentence-level clarity, flow, and tone feedback.",
    "RX.1": "I will note where judgments are uncertain or assumption-dependent based solely on the provided text.",
    "RX.2": "I will avoid validating strong novelty or performance claims without careful hedging and will flag potential overclaims.",
    "RX.3": "I will keep any feedback tightly scoped to this single paragraph rather than broader paper restructuring or new content.",
    "RX.4": "I will avoid suggestions that could encourage misleading presentation of capabilities or unsafe claims.",
    "RX.5": "I will ground observations only in the provided paragraph and standard scholarly writing norms, indicating their provenance."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: To focus the review of this paragraph, should I prioritize A) sentence-level editing for clarity, concision, and tone (R1.6), B) concept/claims review—thesis framing, logical consistency, and novelty/overclaim risks (R1.1/R1.2/R1.4), or C) evidence–claim alignment based only on what’s stated here (R1.3)? Please reply A, B, or C.

rationale.R1.6: A generic request to “take a look at this paragraph” most often implies sentence-level clarity, flow, and tone feedback.
rationale.RX.1: I will note where judgments are uncertain or assumption-dependent based solely on the provided text.
rationale.RX.2: I will avoid validating strong novelty or performance claims without careful hedging and will flag potential overclaims.
rationale.RX.3: I will keep any feedback tightly scoped to this single paragraph rather than broader paper restructuring or new content.
rationale.RX.4: I will avoid suggestions that could encourage misleading presentation of capabilities or unsafe claims.
rationale.RX.5: I will ground observations only in the provided paragraph and standard scholarly writing norms, indicating their provenance.
